author: doll-agent
content: Implemented ma_apply_along_axis(ma, axis, f) — walks every 1-D slice along axis, calls f with a fresh MaskedArray<T, Ix1> view, collects scalar (value, masked) results into an (ndim - 1)-D MaskedArray. ma_apply_over_axes(ma, axes, f) reduces over each axis in succession (sorted, with offset adjustment). ma_vander(x, n) builds a Vandermonde matrix from a 1-D MaskedArray, propagating the input mask to all corresponding rows of the result. Test verifies sum-along-axis-1 of a 2x3 array yields [6, 15].
